message: Hi, nice to chat with you again.
Hi, is chess practise still on today.
Hi bhuti, are you still coming to home this June? If you are bring warm clothes because it is cold over here in SE.
Hi , bhuti unjani namhlanje how is the cold treating you.
Hi Masi , how are you doing? It has been long time since we last spoke to each other.
Hi Athole , how is it going at university?
Hi Isi, how are things going by your side school wise?
